scripts.check:syntax: node --check server.js && node --check public/app.js && node --check demo/fixtures.js && python3 -c "import ast, pathlib; ast.parse(pathlib.Path('pi/dashboard/dashboard_agent.py').read_text())" && bash -n pi/dashboard/*.sh pi/dashboard/lib/*.sh
scripts.check: npm run check:syntax && npm test && npm run audit:public
scripts.check:release: npm run check && npm run audit:history
